items.docs: Lists component blueprints in the Isometric system
Get Component Blueprint
Lists all removal templates within the given project
Gets a single removal template within the given project
Get Removal
Updates a removal in the Isometric system. The removal will be recalculated, if it is are not in an immutable state.

This endpoint deletes a removal - this is irreversible and the removal cannot be recovered.

It will return an error if the removal is not in DRAFT status.
Get Removals
Post Removal
Get Removal Components
Change component attributions for the removal.
Lists GHG statements in the Isometric system
Submits a series of removals for verification
Post Ghg Statement Submit
Get a single GHG statement
Creates a component that will be automatically and evenly attributed to all removals with the GHG Statement.
Creates a component that will be automatically attributed to GHG statements in the project based on the provided allocation strategy.
Manually attributes or removes attribution of a project component to a removal.
Removes all attribution of a project component to a removal.
Gets the organisation associated with the client
Lists datapoints in the Isometric system
Creates a datapoint in the Isometric system
Returns a single datapoint in the Isometric system
Updates a datapoint in the Isometric system. Associated components and removals will be recalculated, if they are not in an immutable state.
Delete a datapoint resource. Will fail if the datapoint is in use by a component.
Lists components associated with a datapoint in the Isometric system
Lists removal template components that use this datapoint
Lists sources in the Isometric system

Creates a source in the Isometric system. The client is provided with a presigned
upload URL which must be used to upload the document associated with this source.
Source documents are private, but other fields will be visible publicly once
credits are issued for an associated removal, moving it to the public registry.

Recreates a presigned upload URL, which must be used to upload the documentation
associated with this source. If the document is already uploaded, this endpoint will
response with a 409 error.
Get single source
Patches metadata associated with a source in the Isometric system.
Deletes a source in the Isometric system. This is irreversible and the source cannot be recovered.

Returns a short-lived signed URL to download a source document from. This query will fail if
the source does not have a private URL or if the authenticated user does not have
access to it. That's why you need to first check the `urlInfo` field on the source
object, to ensure that you can safely use this query.

**Deprecated**. Please use `GET /projects/{project_id}/removal_templates` instead.

Lists projects in the Isometric system

Creates a component in the Isometric system
Get a single component in the Isometric system
Creates a component in the Isometric system. Associated removals will be recalculated, if they are not in an immutable state.
Delete a component resource. Will fail if the component is in use by a verified removal.
Lists feedstock types in the Isometric system. Feedstock types can only be created via the Certify UI.
Get a single feedstock type in the Isometric system. Feedstock types can only be created via the Certify UI.
Updates a feedstock type in the Isometric system. Feedstock types can only be created via the Certify UI.
Deletes a feedstock type in the Isometric system. Feedstock types can only be created via the Certify UI.
Creates a feedstock batch in the Isometric system
Lists feedstock batches in the Isometric system.
Get a single feedstock batch in the Isometric system.
Deletes a feedstock batch in the Isometric system.

Deletes a production batch in the Isometric system

Deletes a biochar application in the Isometric system

Deletes a measurement location in the Isometric system

info.name: Get Project Storage Location Monitoring Requirements

items.docs: Lists all monitoring requirements for a project storage location.
Lists all monitoring requirements for a project.
Get a specific monitoring requirement within a project.
Lists all monitoring submissions for a project monitoring requirement

Creates a monitoring submission for a project monitoring requirement.

The submission is associated with a previously uploaded source document (see [Post Source](/mrv/post-source)).
One source may be used to create multiple submissions.
Deletes a monitoring submission for a project monitoring requirement
Gets all storage units.
Creates a storage unit in the Isometric system.
Gets storage unit by ID.
Gets all sensors.
Creates a sensor in the Isometric system.
Gets sensor by ID.
Gets storage location for a project.
Patches storage location in the Isometric system.
Deletes a storage location for a project
Gets storage locations for a project.
Creates a storage location for a project in the Isometric system.
Get Measurement Samples
Post Measurement Samples
Get a specific data upload job by ID
List data upload jobs with optional status filtering
Post Data Upload Submission
Post File Upload
